title: arenaria montana subsp. intricata
intro: Arenaria montana subsp. intricata, also known as intricata mountain sandwort, is a plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of intricata mountain sandwort include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications for therapeutic purposes.
